rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped citation used to support a broad literature claim that prior WOM research often treated positive WOM similarly regardless of wording. The citing article does not engage De Angelis et al.'s self-enhancement account, generation-versus-transmission distinction, methods, or findings in its theorizing, hypotheses, or empirical tests. Because this reference is not given a distinct role beyond general background, it functions as a passing mention.
